source: Numerics/Data/Statistics/RunningCovarianceMatrix.cs; the push sequence and Mean/Covariance expected values are scraped verbatim from Test_RunningStatistics.cs (Test_RunningMatrix_MultiplePush: five pushes of [1,1,1,1,1]..[5,5,5,5,5] into a size-5 matrix, expecting Mean = [3,3,3,3,3] and Covariance = 1*I + 10*ones(5,5)).
reference: Numerics @ a2c4dbf. Args convention (this port's own): args = [size, num_pushes, data_flat(num_pushes*size), trailing index/indices]. mean_element appends one row index i (Mean is size x 1); covariance_element/sample_covariance_element/sample_correlation_element/population_covariance_element/population_correlation_element append (i, j). sample_covariance_element/sample_correlation_element/population_covariance_element/population_correlation_element are curated, not scraped (Test_RunningStatistics.cs only exercises Mean/Covariance, not the SampleCovariance/SampleCorrelation/PopulationCovariance/PopulationCorrelation properties, and no other upstream test file exercises RunningCovarianceMatrix either): SampleCovariance = Covariance / (N-1) = Covariance/4, an exact-in-binary division (11/4 = 2.75, 10/4 = 2.5); PopulationCovariance = Covariance / N = Covariance/5 (11/5 = 2.2, 10/5 = 2.0). SampleCorrelation's and PopulationCorrelation's off-diagonal entries both reduce algebraically to (10/4)/(2.75) = (10/5)/(2.2) = 10/11 (a repeating binary fraction) since every diagonal entry of Sample/PopulationCovariance is equal, but the actual code path computes each via Matrix::diagonal + Matrix::sqrt + Matrix::inverse (LUDecomposition) + two matrix multiplies rather than a direct division -- exercising the new LU-backed Matrix::inverse() -- so every curated expected value here (including the two population_correlation_* cases) was cross-checked against tools/verify_oracles.py --dump rather than assumed equal to the hand-derived ratio; see each assertion's own "source" tag for provenance.

assertions.source: curated: Covariance/(N-1) = 11/4, verified by oracle gate
curated: Covariance/(N-1) = 10/4, verified by oracle gate
curated: derived via the Matrix::diagonal+sqrt+inverse (LU) path, verified by oracle gate
curated: derived via the Matrix::diagonal+sqrt+inverse (LU) path, verified by oracle gate
curated via oracle_emitter --dump: Covariance/N = 11/5, verified by oracle gate
curated via oracle_emitter --dump: Covariance/N = 10/5, verified by oracle gate
